_status.comment: Pending translation tasks. Only templates with missing translations appear here.

vram_size_update_templates.comment: Templates that need vram and size data management in i18n.json

outdated_translations.comment: Templates with English updates that need translation review

description.en: Input a single image to automatically generate three orthographic views. Use these multiviews with Meshy to create a textured 3D model.
